allow: Bash(从安装目录中自动发现门锁品牌线索，给 identity_engine 喂料。)
Bash(不依赖任何品牌特定代码，纯启发式扫描。)
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); from theme_palette import THEMES; print\(list\(THEMES.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(tar -czf ui_files.tar.gz themes/mist.qss themes/shade.qss themes/glow.qss themes/ink.qss themes/base.template.qss design_tokens.py design_tokens_v4.py theme_palette.py app_main.py main_window_impl.py main_window/navigation.py frontdesk_ui.py frontdesk_ui_v4.py ui_surface.py command_palette.py overlay_widgets.py mini_tab_strip.py enhanced_status_bar.py smart_header.py nav_manifest.py ui/__init__.py ui/tokens/__init__.py ui/tokens/colors.py ui/tokens/spacing.py ui/tokens/typography.py ui/layout/frontdesk.py ui/components/toast.py ui/branding/brand.py tools/qss_compiler.py)
